positive: Stylized vector illustration, centralized composition, of a whimsical group of glowing celestial creatures and mythological fauna (e.g., stylized phoenix, nebula-winged griffin, crescent moon fox) gathered around a blooming cosmic lotus flower. The color palette should be deep indigo, ethereal turquoise, gold leaf accents, and soft lavender. High contrast black lines outline the silhouettes against a vibrant, deep cosmic background. Geometric patterns integrated into the background structure, giving a sacred, ornamental feel. Suitable for T-shirt printing, clean edges, minimalist yet detailed.
